heading.name: Design your T-shirt in minutes with AI. Global delivery!

settings.heading: Design your T-shirt in minutes with AI...

settings.text:
Use AI to create original T-shirt designs in minutes.


Your art goes live in our store — and you get paid for every sale.

custom_css: button,a.button,a.btn {padding: 18px 38px !important; font-size: 20px !important; font-weight: 700 !important; border-radius: 40px !important; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #e53935, #ff1744) !important; color: #fff !important; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(229, 57, 53, 0.4); transition: 0.25s;}
h1,h2 {font-size: 48px !important; font-weight: 800; color: #fff !important; text-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(255, 40, 80, 0.5), 0 0 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6); letter-spacing: 1px;}

settings.text: Describe your idea. AI creates the design.
Put it on a T-shirt and order fast.

custom_css: .collection-list__item img {width: 85% !important; margin: 0 auto; display: block; transition: 0.3s;}

settings.title: Ready for Purchase
settings.description: Choose and buy ready-made T-shirts with the prints on offer.

custom_css: /* Modern heading glow */h2 {font-size: 40px !important; font-weight: 800; color: #ffffff; text-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(255, 0, 80, 0.5), 0 2px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6); letter-spacing: 1px;}
/* Subheading style */p {font-size: 18px; color: #e6e6e6; max-width: 600px; line-height: 1.6; text-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);}
/* Soft overlay on text for readability */h2,p {backdrop-filter: blur(2px);}
worldwide_dUY3Vq.name: Worldwide Shipping

settings.heading: Worldwide Shipping, Fast Delivery
settings.subheading: We ship your AI-designed T-shirts worldwide with fast, reliable delivery.

settings.question: How do I create a T-shirt design?
settings.answer: Simply use our built-in AI tool on the “Create T-shirt” page. Enter your idea, and the AI will generate a unique design for you.

settings.question: Can I create a T-shirt just for myself without publishing it?
settings.answer: Yes. On the first step, select “I’m creating a T-shirt for myself.” Your design will remain private, and nobody else will see it

settings.question: How much money can I earn?
settings.answer:
Every T-shirt has a base cost of $13.99. You set your own selling price.

   👉 If you price your T-shirt at $15.99, you’ll earn $2 profit for each sale.
That means $2,000 profit if 1,000 T-shirts are sold.

settings.question: How do I get my money?
settings.answer: When someone buys your T-shirt, you’ll receive an email with payout instructions. We currently pay creators via PayPal

settings.heading: Got Questions? We’ve Got Answers
settings.subheading: Find answers to the most common questions

custom_css: .main-cta h2 {font-size: 46px !important; color: #ff4d4d !important; text-shadow: 0 0 16px rgba(255, 40, 60, 0.6); font-weight: 800; transition: 0.3s;}
